summary: BTC Tools | Verify CDN Status Page UI
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the BTC Tools page
And the user clicks on the "CDN Status" tab at the top of the page
And !xray-attachment://5d50b519-80c7-4d0a-9533-1b563a79018a|width=1182,height=612!
Then the user lands on the Schedule Page by default
And the user lands on the CDN Status page
And the user sees two distinct tiles, one for "Fastly" and one for "Media CDN"
And each tile contains a toggle switch to enable or disable the respective CDN

steps.action:
*When* the user clicks on the BTC Tools page

*And* the user clicks on the "CDN Status" tab at the top of the page
steps.result:
*Then* the user lands on the Schedule Page by default 

*And* the user lands on the CDN Status page

*And* the user sees two distinct tiles, one for "Fastly" and one for "Media CDN"

*And* each tile contains a toggle switch to enable or disable the respective CDN
